name: a cross-cutting universal rule (e.g. no-hardcoded-secrets) is tagged for BOTH development paths
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/classify-path.sh" --rule-id g-universal-no-hardcoded-secrets --applies-to '{}' 2>e.txt; grep -q 'development_paths=fullstack,iac' e.txt && echo universal-tagged-both 1>&2
